title: Server-Side Request Forgery in url parameter
description: SSRF vulnerability detected in the 'url' parameter. The server made a request to an internal address (169.254.169.254) and returned the response in the HTTP body, indicating the application can be used to probe internal services.

evidence.response_preview: HTTP 200 — metadata containing IAM role info was returned inline

remediation: Implement an allowlist of permitted outbound URLs, block RFC 1918 addresses, and use URL validation that rejects hostnames pointing to private IP ranges.
